extract: Baxcalibur (Japanese: セグレイブ Seglaive) is a dual-type Dragon/Ice Pokémon introduced in Generation IX. It evolves from Arctibax starting at level 54. It is the final form of Frigibax. Baxcalibur can Mega Evolve into Mega Baxcalibur using the Baxcalibrite. Mega Baxcalibur was introduced with the Mega Dimension DLC for Pokémon Legends: Z-A. It is referred to as a pseudo-legendary Pokémon by fans.
